title: symphyotrichum spathulatum var. yosemitanum
intro: Symphyotrichum spathulatum var. yosemitanum, also known as Yosemite aster, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Yosemite aster include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Yosemite aster can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional herbal medicine to treat a range of conditions, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
